name: Driver Buddy Reloaded
description: Automated triage for Windows kernel drivers: IOCTL discovery and decoding, WDM/WDF/KMDF/UMDF structure labelling, heuristic vulnerability checks, pool tag extraction, device name detection, risk scoring, call-chain tracing, and JSON/HTML/PoC reporting.
author: Paolo Stagno (VoidSec)

plugins.name: DriverBuddyReloaded
plugins.description: Vulnerability triage plugin for Windows kernel drivers.
